title: Eternal Nightfall
description: Dive into a dark and terrifying world with Eternal Nightfall, a Minecraft modpack based on horror that will turn your nights into nightmares.
body:
# Eternal Nightfall: Not another Minecraft Horror Modpack
_**Eternal Nightfall** is an immersive Minecraft modpack based on horror, designed to turn your nights into nightmares. Explore a world where light is scarce and night creatures are more frightening and dangerous than ever. Dive into terrifying adventures, solve sinister puzzles, and survive in a hostile environment where every shadowy corner can hide a deadly danger._

## Key features
- **Dark Atmosphere**: An oppressive ambiance with haunted nocturnal landscapes and eerie sounds to fully immerse you in the horror.
- **Frightening Creatures**: Face formidable monsters and malevolent spirits lurking in the darkness.
- **Intense Survival**: Enhanced survival management with limited resources and environmental challenges.
- **New Items and Weapons**: Use a range of tools and weapons specially designed to combat the horrors of the eternal night.

## Recommendations
- **Play with Friends**: Horror is less terrifying in a group, but survival remains a tough challenge.
- **Use Headphones**: For full immersion in the eerie sounds of the night.
- **Prepare Resources**: Always have torches and weapons ready, you never know what lurks in the darkness.

## Credits & Sources
All credits returns to mod authors.\
Mods that are not in Modrinth have been downloaded, verified, tested and imported in the modpack from CurseForge. All credits for these mods also returns to their original authors. You can see their links at the end of the description.

## Previews and Support
Want to know what will the next update be ? Well, here's our [Official Trello](https://trello.com/b/ysGQhbiP/eternal-nightfall) !

For support, please first read the [ErraWiki](https://wiki.erralland.eu/) ("About Eternal Nightfall" section) before coming to our official Discord server.

## Links to Curseforge mods
Mods coming from Curseforge are : 
- "[The Anomaly](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-anomaly)" by clorobored
- "[Creeping Woods](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/creeping-woods)" by Zcoper
- "[The Fake Player](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-fake-player)" by Notelekz
